overview: Newest C10TX wireless ultrasound scanner with dual probe, multipurpose handheld convex+linear+cardiac Ultrasound probe can diagnose whole body parts. C10TX can be used by wired or wireless connection to mobile phones/ipad/PC. It is IP68 waterproof, you can scan whole body part anytime anywhere.

specs.label: Imaging modes
specs.value: B, B/M, Color Doppler, PW, PDI

specs.label: Applications
specs.value: Abdomen, OB/GYN, Cardiac, Vascular, Lung, Thyroid, Breast, MSK, Pediatrics, Urology

features: Built-in dual batteries with wireless charging
Supports measurements, vessel flow analysis, annotation, dual screen, image/video/report saving, and printing
Portable handheld design with anti-skid body and multiple color options
